scripts.validate: pnpm build && node ../../dist/cli.js validate dist --type component
scripts.pack: pnpm build && node ../../dist/cli.js pack dist -o out/promo-banner.zip --type component
scripts.deploy: pnpm build && node ../../dist/cli.js deploy dist --type component
scripts.deploy:dry: pnpm build && node ../../dist/cli.js deploy dist --type component --dry-run
